findings.reason: Journal is the product feature name for trip story/history.
findings.excerpt: `convex/travelFunds.ts` provides a trip-wide Travel Funds meter backed by a transactions ledger. `travelFundsConfig` is a singleton row with `featureEnabled`, `startingBudgetUsd`, and an optional label. `transactions` rows carry their own frozen `localCurrencyPerUsd` and server-computed `usdAmount`, so later exchange-rate changes never mutate history. Visibility splits into `public` / `summary_only` / `private`; `supportCrewListVisibleTransactions` strips `summary_only` rows to `usdAmount` + timestamp and omits `private` rows entirely. `getLinkedCostMap` aggregates by `linkedChallengeId` / `linkedCheckpointId` with role-aware filtering (Support Crew sees only `public` rows in per-target totals).

findings.reason: Drop Crew and Support Crew in user-facing terminology.
findings.excerpt: `convex/travelFunds.ts` provides a trip-wide Travel Funds meter backed by a transactions ledger. `travelFundsConfig` is a singleton row with `featureEnabled`, `startingBudgetUsd`, and an optional label. `transactions` rows carry their own frozen `localCurrencyPerUsd` and server-computed `usdAmount`, so later exchange-rate changes never mutate history. Visibility splits into `public` / `summary_only` / `private`; `supportCrewListVisibleTransactions` strips `summary_only` rows to `usdAmount` + timestamp and omits `private` rows entirely. `getLinkedCostMap` aggregates by `linkedChallengeId` / `linkedCheckpointId` with role-aware filtering (Support Crew sees only `public` rows in per-target totals).

findings.excerpt: `convex/travelFunds.ts` provides a trip-wide Travel Funds meter backed by a transactions ledger. `travelFundsConfig` is a singleton row with `featureEnabled`, `startingBudgetUsd`, and an optional label. `transactions` rows carry their own frozen `localCurrencyPerUsd` and server-computed `usdAmount`, so later exchange-rate changes never mutate history. Visibility splits into `public` / `summary_only` / `private`; `supportCrewListVisibleTransactions` strips `summary_only` rows to `usdAmount` + timestamp and omits `private` rows entirely. `getLinkedCostMap` aggregates by `linkedChallengeId` / `linkedCheckpointId` with role-aware filtering (Support Crew sees only `public` rows in per-target totals).
